name.description: Registry key, matches the sources/<name>/ dir.

citable.description: Whether the source's own URLs may seed a GEM [ref] (still re-verified). GEM-authored datasets: false.

location.description: Where the raw data lives. One of file_path / drive_file_id / url / sibling_path.

sibling_path.description: Path relative to the gem repos root, e.g. ../refineries-tracker/refineries.json

id_field.description: Source column that is its stable primary key.

column_map.description: canonical_field -> source_column_name (or a dotted path for nested json).

capacity_units.description: Default units for the capacity column if the source doesn't carry a units column (e.g. 'bpd' for RMI).

status_map.description: source status value -> controlled Status vocab value.

configuration_map.description: source config code/value -> controlled Configuration vocab value (e.g. H -> hydroskimming).

adapter.description: Optional python module (adapter.py) with a parse() for custom formats.
